name: Mycelium Breakage Prevention
description: Auto-generated rules from git history analysis

checks.name: overflow-hidden-clips-children
checks.rule: overflow:hidden on a parent silently clips children that extend beyond bounds. Check all child elements before adding it.

checks.name: script-order-dependency
checks.rule: Scripts that call each other's globals must load in dependency order. Document the dependency chain in a comment.

checks.name: test-issue
checks.rule: make mycelium work on any repo — fix --init crash, strip NumbahWan refs, fix watch.cjs syntax errors, rename .nw-* to .mycelium-*, tested end-to-end o. RULE: Review carefully before committing.

checks.name: missing-return-statement
checks.rule: Functions that compute values must return them. Missing return causes undefined results and silent failures.

checks.name: use-before-define
checks.rule: Use typeof check before accessing globals that may not be loaded yet. This often indicates a load-order dependency.

checks.name: object-fit-crops-content
checks.rule: object-fit:cover crops images to fill container. Use contain if the full image must be visible (e.g., card art, logos).
